mapper.select: SELECT th.history_id, p.project_title, u.login_id AS user_name, t.task_title, tt.type_name, cc.default_describe, th.action_type, th.action_at AS actionType FROM task_history th INNER JOIN task t ON th.task_id = t.task_id INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN users u ON th.changed_by = u.user_code INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT OUTER JOIN work_time w ON t.task_id = w.task_id LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_code AND cc.common_id = '0E' ORDER BY th.action_at DESC
